zh.lifeSummary: 當William I Earl of Ross於1220年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾費亞時，他的父親Fearchar of Ross50歲，母親Margaret MacGillvray42歲。他於大約1230年與Jean Comyn在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在英國蘇格蘭被列為justiciar of scotland。他去世於1274年5月5日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在羅馬尼亞艾巴。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William I Earl of Ross于1220年出生在苏格兰洛-爾費亞时，他的父亲Fearchar of Ross50岁，母亲Margaret MacGillvray42岁。他于大约1230年与Jean Comyn在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在英国苏格兰被列为justiciar of scotland。他去世于1274年5月5日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在罗马尼亚艾巴。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William I Earl of Ross was born in 1220, in Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, his father, Fearchar of Ross, was 50 and his mother, Margaret MacGillvray, was 42. He married Jean Comyn about 1230, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as justiciar of scotland in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 5 May 1274, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Alba, Romania.

fr.Earl William de Ross: Earl, Poplar Valley No. 12, Saskatchewan, Canada
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William I Earl of Ross est né en 1220, à Fearn, Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, Fearchar of Ross, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret MacGillvray, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Jean Comyn environ 1230, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of scotland à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 5 mai 1274, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Alba, Roumanie.

de.Earl William de Ross: Earl, Poplar Valley No. 12, Saskatchewan, Kanada
de.lifeSummary: Als William I Earl of Ross 1220 in Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fearchar of Ross 50 und seine Mutter Margaret MacGillvray 42. Er hat um 1230 in Scotland Jean Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als justiciar of scotland in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. Mai 1274 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Alba, Rumänien begraben.

it.Earl William de Ross: Earl, Poplar Valley No. 12, Saskatchewan, Canada
it.lifeSummary: Quando William I Earl of Ross è nato il nel 1220 nel Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Fearchar of Ross, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Margaret MacGillvray, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Jean Comyn circa 1230, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of scotland nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 5 maggio 1274, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Alba, Romania.

ja.lifeSummary: William I Earl of Rossが1220年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアフエアルンで生まれた時，父Fearchar of Rossは50歳，母Margaret MacGillvrayは42歳であった。約1230年にスコットランドでJean Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。イギリススコットランドでの職業はjusticiar of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1274年5月5日に故郷で54歳で死去し，ルーマニアアルバにて埋葬された。

ko.Earl William de Ross: 캐나다 서스캐처원 포플라 발리 노. 1 에를
ko.lifeSummary: William I Earl of Ross(이)가 1220년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 피른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fearchar of Ross(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret MacGillvray(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 스컷랜드에서 Jean Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 justiciar of scotland이었다. 그는 1274년 5월 5일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 루마니아 알바에 묻혔다.

pt.Earl William de Ross: Earl, Poplar Valley No. 12, Saskatchewan, Canadá
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William I Earl of Ross nasceu em 1220, em Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Fearchar of Ross, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Margaret MacGillvray, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean Comyn aproximadamente 1230, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como justiciar of scotland em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 5 de maio de 1274, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Alba, Romênia.

ro.Earl William de Ross: Earl, Poplar Valley No. 12, Saskatchewan, Canada

ru.Earl William de Ross: эарл, поплар валли но. 1, Саскачеван, Канада
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William I Earl of Ross родился в 1220 г. в местности фирн, росс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Fearchar of Ross было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret MacGillvray, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Comyn около 1230 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии justiciar of scotland в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 5 мая 1274 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности алба, Румыния.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William I Earl of Ross nació en 1220, en Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, su papá, Fearchar of Ross, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Margaret MacGillvray, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Jean Comyn aproximadamente 1230, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era justiciar of scotland en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 5 de mayo de 1274, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Alba, Rumania.
